codeReview.summary: The feature addresses 7/8 fixes cleanly, but BUG 1 is only partially mitigated. The HUD guard is time-window based and does not track/liveness-check an existing spawned process, so detached process accumulation can still occur when session-summary runs longer than the fixed window.

issues.description: The duplicate-spawn prevention uses only a 120s timestamp window (`now - lastSummarySpawnTimestamp < 120_000`) instead of tracking the spawned process and checking if it is still alive. If `session-summary.mjs` hangs or runs >120s, new detached processes will still be spawned every 120s, so accumulation remains unbounded.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata requires `bugfix-worker`, but that skill is missing from the repository skill set; worker had to deviate from the prescribed procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission feature entry (`features.json`) sets `skillName: "bugfix-worker"`; no matching skill exists under `skills/` or `.factory/skills/`; handoff `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false` cites missing skill.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission review instructions assume shared-state artifacts (`.factory/services.yaml`, `.factory/library/`) that are not present in this repo, reducing reviewer ability to validate service/knowledge documentation gaps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Paths `/home/paul/oh-my-claudecode/.factory/services.yaml` and `/home/paul/oh-my-claudecode/.factory/library` are absent (ENOENT during review).

summary: Review failed due to one blocking gap in BUG 1: the session-summary spawn fix is timestamp-throttled but not process-liveness-aware, so it does not fully eliminate unbounded detached process accumulation for long-running/hung summary jobs.
